title_en: New Joy-Con Alert – Blue and Yellow Splatoon-Themed Joy-Con 2 Are Now Available
body_en:
Just in time for Splatoon Raiders , Nintendo's new blue and yellow Joy-Con 2 for the Switch 2 are now available.
The new Joy-Con 2 color scheme, which went up for pre-order last month , can now be found at Amazon, Best Buy, and Nintendo for $99.99.
Like previous Joy-Con 2 models , the new color scheme accents the mostly-black Joy-Con with a splash of blue on the left grip and light yellow on the right, matching the Splatoon band Deep Cut. Here's a detailed look of the new colorway:
As for Splatoon Raiders, our 9/10 review calls it "an incredibly well-designed action RPG with an expertly executed loop. Be sure to check out the full review for more.
Bo Moore is IGN's Senior Manager of Tech. You can find him online @usebomswisely.
